name: YTLite (paywall-free fork)
subtitle: YTLite 5.2.1 built from public source — no subscription gate
description: Build of dayanch96/YTLite v5.2.1 from public source code on the faisalga/YTLite fork's custom branch. The verifyAccessWithCompletion: paywall logic exists only in the upstream's pre-built .deb (private branch), not in the public source — so a clean source-build yields a fully unlocked YTLite. Updated nightly via auto-sync from upstream. Add this source for the latest source-built YTLite IPA.

apps.name: YTLite (fork)
apps.subtitle: Paywall-free YTLite 5.2.1 + 6 integrations
apps.localizedDescription:
Source-built YTLite from faisalga/YTLite custom branch. Identical to the official YTLite 5.2.1 minus the verifyAccessWithCompletion: subscription gate (which exists only in the upstream's pre-built binary, not in the public .x source files).

Bundled integrations:
• YouPiP (Picture-in-Picture)
• YTUHD (1440p / 4K unlock)
• YouQuality (overlay quality control)
• Return YouTube Dislikes
• YTABConfig (A/B feature flags)
• DontEatMyContent (Dynamic Island fix)
• YTVideoOverlay + YouGroupSettings (helpers)
• Open in YouTube Safari extension was stripped to ensure clean AltStore install (no .appex bundle ID prefix mismatch with re-signed parent).

Alternative to YTBetterPlus — uses YouTube 21.17.3 base (vs YTBetterPlus's 21.13.6) and the latest YTLite source (5.2.1, source-built) rather than the older free 5.2b4 .deb.

Shares com.google.ios.youtube bundle ID with YouTubePlus and YTBetterPlus — only one can be installed at a time on the device.

versions.localizedDescription:
Source-built YTLite — now with bundle resources.

• YouTube 21.17.3 base (decrypted)
• YTLite 5.2.1 built from public source on faisalga/YTLite (paywall logic not present in source)
• Integrations: YouPiP, YTUHD, YouQuality, Return YouTube Dislikes, YTABConfig, DontEatMyContent
• YTLite.bundle injected (Assets.car + 13 Localizable.strings + SponsorAudio.m4a) — settings UI now renders proper labels and tab/navigation customization works
• PlugIns/ stripped (no AltStore re-signing prefix mismatch)
• Build: faisalga/YTLite Actions run #7 (ytp-7)

Fix vs prior build: the previous (ytp-6) IPA was missing YTLite.bundle/ — cyan extracts the .dylib from the source-built .deb but doesn't carry bundle resources through. The workflow now extracts YTLite.bundle from the .deb explicitly and passes it as a separate artifact to cyan.

privacy.NSAppleMusicUsageDescription: This lets you add your own audio files to your videos.
privacy.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: YouTube needs bluetooth access to scan for nearby Cast devices.
privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: This lets you create videos using the app.
privacy.NSContactsUsageDescription: Your contacts will be sent to YouTube servers to help you find friends to share videos with.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Access to your network allows YouTube to discover and connect to devices such as your TV.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This enables local content discovery, improved recommendations, and enhanced search results.
privacy.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This lets you include audio with your videos and search using your voice.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This lets you upload media you've already created.
privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: To personalize ads and provide ad measurement, YouTube will link activity from this app with activity from non-Google apps and websites.

news.title: First paywall-free YTLite source-build shipped
news.caption: Built YTLite 5.2.1 from public source on the faisalga/YTLite fork — same code as upstream's pre-built .deb minus the verifyAccessWithCompletion: subscription gate (which lives only in the private build, not in public source).
